latin: Pugil ante magnum certamen in viis noctu cucurrit. cum gradus templi ascendisset, pugnis in caelum sublatis, clamavit: 'io, Adriana!'

questions.target: At night, running through the streets
choices: At night, running through the streets
In the afternoon at a park

questions.prompt: What does he shout at the top of the steps?

translation: A boxer ran through the streets at night before a great match. When he had climbed the steps of the museum, with fists raised to the sky, he shouted: 'Yo, Adrian!'
